en_title: Steam’s Record-Breaking $11 Billion Profit in First Half of 2026 Was Funded Mostly by Older Games
cn_title: Steam半年利润110亿美元(约合人民币746亿元)老游戏占近八成
subtitle: 老游戏撑起收入
opus_summary: Steam在2026年上半年收入达到创纪录的110亿美元(约合人民币746亿元)，创22年历史新高；其中79%的购买来自2025年或更早发行的游戏，老作品成为增长主力。

paragraphs.en: Steam just had its most profitable period in its entire 22-year history, raking in $11 billion in the last six months — and it's mostly thanks to older games.
paragraphs.cn: Steam刚刚迎来22年历史上最赚钱的时期，过去六个月收入达到110亿美元(约合人民币746亿元)，而这主要归功于老游戏。

paragraphs.en: As shown in data aggregated by Alinea Analytics , this figure rivals what the platform grossed in the whole of 2020 during the peak of the pandemic ($7.2 billion), and much of it was due to purchases of older video games.
paragraphs.cn: Alinea Analytics汇总的数据显示，这一数字可与平台在疫情高峰期整个2020年的收入72亿美元(约合人民币488亿元)相比，其中很大一部分来自玩家购买老游戏。

paragraphs.en: In fact, only 21% of purchases from January - June were for titles released in 2026. That means a whopping 79% of games bought by players were from 2025 or older. This trend has only been increasing in recent years, with just 29% of 2024 revenue coming from games released that year, and 27% in 2025 from that year’s titles.
paragraphs.cn: 事实上，1月至6月的购买中只有21%来自2026年发行的作品，也就是说玩家购买的游戏有高达79%发行于2025年或更早。这一趋势近年持续增强：2024年收入中仅29%来自当年发行的游戏，2025年这一比例为27%。

paragraphs.en: Alinea Analytics’ breakdown of games purchased on Steam in the last six months show that titles released in 2026 made up the platform’s biggest earners thus far, with Forza Horizon 6 , Resident Evil Requiem , and Crimson Desert taking the top three spots, earning $197.6M, $194.5M, and $190.1M, respectively.
paragraphs.cn: Alinea Analytics对过去六个月Steam游戏购买情况的分析显示，2026年新作仍包揽了平台目前收入最高的几个席位：《极限竞速：地平线6》《生化危机：安魂曲》和《红色沙漠》位列前三，收入分别为1.976亿美元(约合人民币13亿元)、1.945亿美元(约合人民币13亿元)和1.901亿美元(约合人民币13亿元)。

paragraphs.en: While these are the most-purchased games on Steam in 2026, it seems a bevy of releases from years past are making up the bulk of its revenue right now.
paragraphs.cn: 这些虽然是2026年Steam上购买量最高的游戏，但平台当前收入的大头似乎仍由大量往年作品构成。

paragraphs.en: Steam’s 2026 earnings have already nearly outpaced what it made in 2021 ($11.4 billion), with Elliott stating the platform has almost quintupled its half-year revenue in ten years.
paragraphs.cn: Steam在2026年的收入已经接近超过2021年全年创下的114亿美元(约合人民币773亿元)。Elliott表示，该平台的半年收入在十年间增长了近五倍。

paragraphs.en: With the Steam Machine’s release on the horizon, we could be looking at a massively dominant year for the company as more consoles edge toward digital-only releases .
paragraphs.cn: 随着Steam Machine即将推出，加之越来越多主机逐步转向纯数字发行，该公司今年可能会展现出极强的市场统治力。
